nasb.text: “But they, our fathers, acted arrogantly; They became stubborn and would not listen to Your commandments.

esv.text: “But they and our fathers acted presumptuously and stiffened their neck and did not obey your commandments.

cnv.text: 但是我們的列祖狂妄自大， 硬著頸項，不聽從你的命令。

ccb.text: 但我们的祖先行事狂傲，顽固不化，不肯听从你的诫命。
